Table	Create Table
epi_discount_alerts	CREATE TABLE `epi_discount_alerts` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `companyId` int NOT NULL,
  `employeeId` int NOT NULL,
  `epiDeliveryId` int NOT NULL,
  `epi_nome` varchar(1000) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `ca` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `quantidade` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `valor_unitario` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `valor_total` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `motivo_cobranca` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `mes_referencia` varchar(7) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pendente','confirmado','cancelado') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `validado_por` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `validado_por_user_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `data_validacao` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `justificativa` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `eda_company` (`companyId`),
  KEY `eda_employee` (`employeeId`),
  KEY `eda_delivery` (`epiDeliveryId`),
  KEY `eda_status` (`status`),
  KEY `eda_mes` (`companyId`,`mes_referencia`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=60001
